Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery By Defendant Cesari, Werner & Moriarty, Pc. (Jpt P. Catalanotti Recusal From 3/11/20 Discovery Calendar)
Off Calendar Jul-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jennifer A. Becker, Esq. of Long & Levit, LLP, T:415.438.4547, for defendant/moving party, on court call;
Michael C. Cooper, Esq. of Carlson, Calladine & Peterson, LLP, T:415.391.3911, for plaintiff/opposing party, on court call.

RULING: The matter was discussed & argued. After hearing on DEFENDANT CESARI, WERNER & MORIARTY, P.C's Motion To Compel Discovery, and at the request of plaintiff's counse, the Court ordered that:

Both parties shall submit simultaneous letter briefs re: the issues raised by the court in the tentative ruling regarding Evidence Code Section 958 and its application in this situation. Those briefs shall be efiled by the close of business on June 18, 2020 at which time the court will take the matter under submission and issue a ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Set For Trial On Oct-05-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar May-28-2020 Continued To Apr-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY BY DEFENDANT CESARI, WERNER & MORIARTY, PC.

Appearances: Michael Cooper of Carlson Calladine & Peterson LLP (415.391.3911) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party; Jennifer A. Becker of Long & Levit, LLP (415.397.2222) appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party.

At this time, counsel do not stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The matter is argued. The matter is continued to April 16, 2020 at 9:30 am in department 302 to be heard before Judge Schulman. Should counsel receive consent from their clients to stipulate to the Pro Tem deciding the matter, counsel are to email the Judge Pro Tem at mpritt@bsfllp.com no later than close of business on March 20, 2020. Judge Pro Tem: Maxwell Pritt, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Rick Galten, CSR 13202 (Email: shaolinjedi@comcast.net) (302/JPT)
